name: Scrap-Iron Signal
name_jp: くず<ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のシグナル
desc: When your opponent activates a monster effect, while you control a Synchro Monster that mentions a Synchro Monster as material: Negate the activation, also, after that, Set this card face-down instead of sending it to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Scrap-Iron Signal" per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a monster effect, while you control a Synchro Monster that mentions a Synchro Monster as material: Negate the activation, also, after that, Set this card face-down instead of sending it to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Scrap-Iron Signal" per turn.

action: Sets face-up cards in your Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
